situationBrief: 14 exceptions are active across your zone, up from 9 at last shift close. The highest-priority cluster is three customs holds at the Laredo crossing tied to Gold-tier orders. SignalTrack dropped tracking on two refrigerated loads in the past hour, so cold-chain status on those is currently inferred rather than confirmed.

sourceHealth.detail: GPS pings delayed 8 to 15 min on carrier feed
No events received in 42 min, last sync 06:58 CT

exceptions.headline: Customs hold at Laredo, missing commercial invoice
exceptions.description: Shipment is held at the Laredo crossing pending a corrected commercial invoice. **Two Gold-tier customer orders** are attached to this load, and the current SLA breach window closes in **3 hours 40 minutes**. BorderIQ flags the hold reason as Documentation Gap, the most common resolvable category.

exceptions.headline: Customs hold at Laredo, sanctions screening flag
exceptions.description: A consignee name partially matched a sanctions watchlist entry during automated screening. **This requires manual clearance** before the load can proceed. No documentation gap otherwise, filing is complete.

exceptions.headline: Cold-chain reefer silent for 46 minutes
exceptions.description: SignalTrack has not received a telematics ping from this reefer trailer in **46 minutes**, exceeding the 30-minute silent-period threshold. Cold-chain condition is currently **inferred** from the last confirmed reading rather than live data, because the source feed is degraded.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Inferred from last confirmed reading at 13:44 CT plus lane transit model

exceptions.headline: Inbound dock queue backed up at Site 12
exceptions.description: Nexus WMS shows **7 trailers** waiting at Site 12 inbound doors, average wait now 2 hours 10 minutes. Two of the waiting loads carry time-sensitive produce.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS dock schedule, synced 14:15 CT

exceptions.headline: ETA deviation beyond threshold, Chicago lane
exceptions.description: SignalTrack projects arrival **2 hours 15 minutes** past the committed delivery window based on current speed and remaining distance. No stop or detour reported yet.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: ETA model using live GPS speed and remaining route distance

exceptions.headline: ETA deviation beyond threshold, Chicago lane
exceptions.description: Same lane and carrier as SHP-50410. Projected to arrive **1 hour 50 minutes** late. Both loads share a dispatcher, worth a single call to resolve.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: ETA model using live GPS speed and remaining route distance

exceptions.headline: Short shipment, ASN mismatch at receiving
exceptions.description: Received quantity is **12 units short** of the advance ship notice at Site 04. Discrepancy was logged during putaway scan, not yet reconciled with the supplier.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS receiving event, scanned 11:20 CT

exceptions.headline: Driver reported flat trailer tire, roadside
exceptions.description: Filed manually by dispatch. Driver is stopped at a rest area waiting on roadside assistance. No telematics feed is attached to this shipment yet, so location is approximate.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Manually filed ticket, no source-system corroboration yet

exceptions.headline: Prohibited goods alert, escalated to compliance
exceptions.description: BorderIQ flagged a line item as a potential prohibited-goods match. Escalated to the compliance desk **38 minutes ago**, still awaiting a ruling. This shipment carries a Gold-tier customer commitment due today.

exceptions.headline: Carrier gone silent, 3 hours no response
exceptions.description: Atlas Transit has not responded to tender confirmation requests in **3 hours**. FleetCommand TMS marks the booking as unconfirmed. Escalated by the routing team pending a backup carrier decision.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: FleetCommand TMS tender log, last contact 11:30 CT

exceptions.headline: Inventory count variance, escalated to site lead
exceptions.description: Cycle count at Site 09 shows a **340-unit variance** against the WMS ledger for a fast-moving SKU. Escalated pending a physical recount before the next outbound wave.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS cycle count, reconciled 09:10 CT

exceptions.headline: Outbound dock delay, delegated to Site 12 lead
exceptions.description: Delegated to the site operations lead this morning. Outbound loading is running **55 minutes behind** schedule due to a labor shortfall on second shift.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS dock schedule, synced 13:05 CT

exceptions.headline: Customer requested delivery reschedule
exceptions.description: Filed manually after a customer call requesting a later delivery window. Delegated to the customer success team to confirm the new appointment.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Manually filed ticket, awaiting OrderPulse appointment confirmation

exceptions.headline: Minor document correction, delegated to broker
exceptions.description: A HS code typo was found during BorderIQ's automated review. Delegated to the customs broker for a routine amendment, no compliance risk.
